name: collection_page_5_collections_teas

facts.note: A sort dropdown is visible above the product grid.
No filter control is visible in the sampled mobile collection view.
Product cards do not show review stars, best-seller badges, or other proof markers.
Multiple product cards visibly show "Sold Out."

observed_strengths.observation: Collection copy explains the tea range by use case and includes a visible sort control.

missing_or_weak.observation: The collection view lacks filters and card-level proof cues, making scan-and-select harder on mobile.

purchase_path_notes: The teas collection helps shoppers sort, but it does not help them narrow by need state or identify social proof quickly.
